title: Cosmos Remix — Flow Field you can retune and reskin live
summary: Remixable particle flow field: particles are advected along a cheap seeded value-noise field (angle = noise(x,y)·2π + drift) so they stream in organic, curl-like ribbons, recycling positions seamlessly via a periodic loop on u. A live glass control panel lets you retune palette/shape/density/speed/size plus a Turbulence knob, and reskins to any brand colour in one click. Self-contained, zero deps; ?auto=1 hides the panel and renders a deterministic seamless loop.
usage_notes: RUN: open index.html and use the top-right panel — pick a palette to reskin to any brand colour, drag Density/Spread/Speed/Dot size, and drag Turbulence to make the ribbons calmer or wilder; ↻ Seed cycles palette, ⧉ Copy copies your config. KEY TECHNIQUES: a cheap deterministic seeded value-noise (smoothstep-interpolated integer hash) defines a flow field; each particle starts at a fixed golden-angle seed point and is integrated downstream along the field (angle = vnoise(x,y)·2π·turb + u·2π drift), wrapping on the torus and fading at its life ends so recycling is invisible and frame(0)===frame(LOOP); colour comes from ramp(pal.cols,t) over the per-particle index; PARAMS convention = window.__params describes knobs and window.setParam(key,value) applies them so a generic remix harness can auto-build the panel; theme tokens = a PALETTES map driving both a CSS accent var and the dot ramp; shapes via drawShape(). CAPTURE: ?auto=1 hides panel + window.__seek(t). TUNE: raise Turbulence for tighter curls, lower Spread for finer ribbons; add palettes to PALETTES, extend __params.
